text.title: Design Tokens Fundamentals Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Design Tokens Fundamentals.

example.scenario: Founder bootstraps a token system: global tier has 18 color primitives, 7 spacing values; semantic tier has 24 intent aliases (color.feedback.error → {global.red.500}); component tier has 6 overrides for the auth flow. Style Dictionary lint runs on every PR; first major bump 1.0.0 → 2.0.0 ships when color.brand → color.primary is renamed.
example.trace: r1-three-tiers-mandatory → r2-semantic-references-only → r3-intent-not-value-naming → r4-single-source-of-truth → r6-ci-lint-gate → tokens published
